title: Cleangor Crevice Cleaning Brushes UK, Serrated Bristle Grouting Cleaning Brush for Small Spaces, Magic Brush, Bathroom Accessory, Cleaning Tools, Cleaning Supplies for Shower, Toilet, Sink(2, Black)
features: Quality Materials: Crevice cleaning brushes sturdy plastic and alloy structure, PP handle, not easy to bend, serrated hard bristles, not easy to deform and fall off, durable and sustainable.
Ergonomic Design: Non-slip ergonomic design handle, easy to grip, comfortable and labor-saving, protecting our hands.

Efficient Cleaning: Narrow head and front curved design, can easily enter gaps, cracks, corners tight spaces and hard-to-reach areas, thick and long jaw bristles can effectively remove dust, debris and dirt in hard to reach areas.
Convenient Size: Crevice brush is small and portable, easy to store and transport. Suitable for home use and travel.
Easy Storage: A small hole on the handle allows easy hanging for drying and storage, saving space neatly.

Multi-purpose Brush: Our cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning various surfaces such as sinks, window tracks, blinds, door tracks, faucets, cars, stoves, grout lines, basins, floors, keyboards, bathtubs, vents, drains, swimming pools, vehicles, furniture, boats, microwaves, coffee machines, shower door frames, fans, shoes, sneakers, ovens, washing machines, toilet tank floors, the seam between the toilet bottom and toilet lid, the gaps in carved furniture, outdoor brick seams, etc.

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Cleaning hard-to-reach areas, Corner cleaning, Gap Cleaning
specifications_table.Surface Recommendation: Kitchen, Bathroom, Shower, House, Cleaner, Apartment, New Home, Toilet, Window Track, Door Track, Stovetop, Sink, Faucet, Grout Lines, Car Seat, Floor, Dryer Vent, Bathtub, Floor, Furniture, Cooker, Counter, Dish, Grill, Microwave, Coffee Maker, Pool, Vehicle, Deck, Basin, Flower Pots, Boat, Radiator, Door Frames, Fans, Shoes, Water Bottle, Waste Bin, Refrigerator Coil, Keyboards, Bicycle, etc
specifications_table.Manufacturer: Guangzhou Meishan Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
